Title: Semantic Bridges for Student Modeling: Leveraging LLM-Generated Narratives for Interpretable Representation Learning
Abstract: Student modeling plays a central role in adaptive learning systems. However, current methods often require a trade-off between representational richness and interpretability. Traditional feature engineering produces interpretable but semantically shallow representations, while deep learning methods achieve rich embeddings at the cost of explainability.
